chapters.title: Capital Allocation Is the Core Executive Skill

summaryBullets: Treating capital allocation as the center of leadership rather than a finance side task creates clearer judgment.
Great operators create value by choosing where cash should and should not go.
This matters because returns improve when leaders allocate capital with discipline instead of prestige.
A common mistake is confusing visible activity with intelligent capital use.
The pattern becomes easier to see when the company is busy yet cash keeps flowing into weak uses.
A practical starting move is to trace where cash is going, compare expected return across options, and say no to low quality uses of capital.
keyTakeaways: Treating capital allocation as the center of leadership rather than a finance side task creates clearer judgment. This perspective helps people make clearer decisions and follow through with more discipline when stakes rise.
practice: trace where cash is going
compare expected return across options
say no to low quality uses of capital
review whether the allocation actually improved value

chapters.title: Decentralization Works With the Right Standards

summaryBullets: Using decentralization so operators can move while capital discipline stays at the center creates clearer judgment.
Strong leaders avoid unnecessary control when they can get better decisions through clear standards.
This matters because decentralization matters because information is local even when capital is centralized.
A common mistake is centralizing every operating choice because control feels safer.
The pattern becomes easier to see when the center is overloaded while local knowledge is underused.
A practical starting move is to push decisions closer to the facts, keep capital discipline visible, and define the standard clearly.
keyTakeaways: Using decentralization so operators can move while capital discipline stays at the center creates clearer judgment. This perspective helps people make clearer decisions and follow through with more discipline when stakes rise.
practice: push decisions closer to the facts
keep capital discipline visible
define the standard clearly
review outcomes without choking local initiative
